hero.tagline1: The sustainable way to build brands.
hero.tagline2: Six brands. One team. One story.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.block1: Most brands live in three separate worlds: brand, ops, data. None of them see each other.
mission.block2: We believe the next decade belongs to houses — not single brands. Shared intelligence, shared ops, shared stories.
mission.block3: HoSB is that house. Six brands, one operating team, one shared playbook.

paths.title: Where do you want to go?

foundersUniversity.title: Founders University
foundersUniversity.hook: Build brands from the inside. 3–6 month fellowship.

ambassadors.title: Ambassador Program
ambassadors.hook: Sustainable brands, great samples, fair commissions.

ai.label: PYTHIA
ai.kicker: Named after the Oracle of Delphi.
ai.heading: An AI that sees trends before the market reacts.
ai.paragraph: Pythia reads Google and Amazon searches in real time. Trends, category shifts, buying intent — surfaced early, acted on fast.
ai.capability1: Pattern-match brand health against our playbook. Surface what the market has mispriced.
ai.capability2: Identify the operational lever that moves each brand. Learn across the house.
ai.capability3: Attribute signal to outcome. No dashboard theater — one reading, every morning.

stub.description: This funnel is being built. Application form ships with Phase B.

footer.operated: Operated by Hart Limes GmbH · Hamburg
